---
name: Task or Sub-issue｜子任务
about: Track one concrete analysis, implementation, verification, or documentation task under a parent issue
title: '[Task]: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Parent Issue｜父 Issue
Link the parent issue here. Example: `Parent: #123`

## Task Type｜任务类型
Choose one and delete the others:
- Analysis
- Implementation
- Verification
- Documentation

## Objective｜任务目标
Describe the single concrete outcome this sub-issue must deliver.

## Scope｜范围
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Dependencies｜依赖关系
List any blocking or related issues, PRs, or tasks.

## Acceptance Criteria｜验收标准
-

## Validation｜验证方式
Describe the checks, tests, or review steps required before closing this sub-issue.

## Additional Context｜补充信息
Add implementation notes, references, or links if needed.
